title: Lumina
description: A niche, lightweight, fullbright gamma utility mod with per dimension brightness
body: # Lumina A niche, lightweight, fullbright gamma utility mod. Allows for better visibility in the dark, as well as configurable brightness levels for the Nether and End dimensions. 💡 **Press `G` to toggle fullbright!** ## ✅ Features - **Sodium Integration** - Config is available in Video Settings - **Dimension Brightness** - Customize your brightness and fullbright values for each dimension - Automatically adjusts when traveling between dimensions - **Actionbar Notifications** - Minimal and Simple Actionbar Message styles - Toggleable - **Smooth Transition** - Configurable via slider, eases in and out - 100% = instant, 1% = slow ## 🚧 Planned Features - Customizable "Minimal" and "Simple" Action bar messages I don't want to add too much bloat to this mod so features will be limited!
